Singular: sheaf of notes on the cloister demon
Plural: sheaves of notes on the cloister demon
Description:
Handwritten notes on the cloister demon, the powerful fiend residing near the abandoned ascent.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Cloister Demon

Singular: sheaf of notes on the mythic idol
Plural: sheaves of notes on the mythic idol
Description:
Handwritten notes on the mythic idol, a strange ceramic construct found in the crystallized caverns.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Mythic Idol

Singular: sheaf of notes on the crescent berserker
Plural: sheaves of notes on the crescent berserker
Description:
Handwritten notes on the crescent berserker, a fearsome entity that stalks the shadowed city.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Crescent Berserker

Singular: sheaf of notes on the Nymian petalodus
Plural: sheaves of notes on the Nymian petalodus
Description:
Handwritten notes on the curious limbed shark of legend, the Nymian petalodus.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Nymian Petalodus

Singular: sheaf of notes on black chocobos
Plural: sheaves of notes on black chocobos
Description:
Handwritten notes on the variety of chocobo that thrives on the Occult Crescent.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on Black Chocobos

Singular: sheaf of notes on the trade tortoise
Plural: sheaves of notes on the trade tortoise
Description:
Handwritten notes on the trade tortoise, a reptilian familiar and peddler of questionable wares.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Trade Tortoise

Singular: sheaf of notes on the demon tablet
Plural: sheaves of notes on the demon tablet
Description:
Handwritten notes on the stone creature that guards the entrance to the Tower of Blood.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Demon Tablet

Singular: sheaf of notes on the Dead Stars
Plural: sheaves of notes on the Dead Stars
Description:
Handwritten notes on the infantile trio of familiars, Nereid, Triton, and Phobos.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Dead Stars

Singular: sheaf of notes on the marble dragon
Plural: sheaves of notes on the marble dragon
Description:
Handwritten notes on the draconic entity that protects the Glaciology Forum in the Tower of Blood.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on the Marble Dragon

Description:
Handwritten notes on Magitaur, the monstrous, heavily armed guardian of the Tower of Blood's uppermost chambers.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on Magitaur

Singular: sheaf of notes on persistent pots
Plural: sheaves of notes on persistent pots
Description:
Handwritten notes on the mischievous, elixir-thirsty creatures that inhabit the Occult Crescent.

Use to add to the Occult Record.
Name: Notes on Persistent Pots

Description:
A coffer filled with antique coins. Consumed upon use of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Zeninage<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

※Only available for use on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Occult Coffer

Description:
This special blend of herbal extracts and aetheric essence rejuvenates body and mind, instantly restoring HP or MP. Consumed upon use of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Occult Potion<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Occult Ether<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

※Only available for use on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Occult Potion

Description:
This special blend of herbal extracts and aetheric essence rejuvenates body and mind, instantly restoring HP and MP. Consumed upon use of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Occult Elixir<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

※Only available for use on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Occult Elixir

Description: Crystallized aether forged in battle. Only on the Occult Crescent or at high altitude can demiatma take on this hue.
Name: Azurite Demiatma

Description: Crystallized aether forged in battle. Only on the Occult Crescent or by massive rivers can demiatma take on this hue.
Name: Verdigris Demiatma

Description: Crystallized aether forged in battle. Only on the Occult Crescent or within thick-canopied forests can demiatma take on this hue.
Name: Malachite Demiatma

Description: Crystallized aether forged in battle. Only on the Occult Crescent or on arid plains can demiatma take on this hue.
Name: Realgar Demiatma

Description: Crystallized aether forged in battle. Only on the Occult Crescent or during perpetual thunderstorms can demiatma take on this hue.
Name: Caput Mortuum Demiatma

Description: Crystallized aether forged in battle. Only on the Occult Crescent or in golden sanctuaries can demiatma take on this hue.
Name: Orpiment Demiatma

Description: A strange ore warped by the abundant aether permeating the Occult Crescent.
Name: Arcanite

Description:
Crystallized knowledge of a phantom job. Use to unlock Berserker.

※Can only be used on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Berserker's Soul Shard

Description:

Name: X-Fixative

An entity born of the ice-wielding familiar Nereid. That's the purple one.

Use item to acquire the Naiad minion.
Name: Naiad

Description:
An entity born of the poison-wielding familiar Phobos. That's the green one.

Use item to acquire the Deimos minion.
Name: Deimos

Description:
Would be a generous tipper if its coins were real.

Use item to acquire the tipping tortoise minion.
Name: Tipping Tortoise

Description:
A winsome bird with pure white feathers and a pink beak.

Use item to acquire the Skallic uolosapa minion.
Name: Skallic Uolosapa

Description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your ancient airship will magically bring the vessel to life.
Name: Ancient Airship Identification Key

Description: A curved horn that, when blown, emits a verdant tone that brings a branchbearer gliding to your side.
Name: Branchbearer Horn

Description: When blown, this horn of bone emits a ghastly sound that manifests your demon haul.
Name: Demon Haul Horn

Description: This tiny flute emits a friendly tone that calls your petalodus stampeding to your side.
Name: Petalodus Whistle

Description: An illustrated manual detailing proper methods of flaunting one's favorite fashions at every angle with a delightful pirouette. Use to learn the /twirl emote.
Name: Ballroom Etiquette: Fashion Forward

Description: The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics</Emphasis> covers, in detail, techniques for concealing one's visage with a luscious curtain of locks that fall past the eyes.
Name: Modern Aesthetics: Fulsome Forelocks

Description:
An epic (★★★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 425
Name: Magitaur Card

Description:
An uncommon (★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 426
Name: Blue Leafkin Card

Description:
An uncommon (★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 427
Name: Wivre Card

Description:
A rare (★★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 428
Name: Doppro Card

Description: A blood-daubed document formalizing the pact between the Occult Crescent's mysterious architect and the cloister demon.
Name: Voidsent Contract

Description:
Soil charred from a war long past.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Xobr'it Charcoal

Description:
The burnt shreds of destroyed foliage.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Charred Bark

Description:
Shellfish imbued with the abundant charcoal of its environment.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Cindershell

Description:
Softly luminescent liquid that has been heavily influenced by meteorites.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Glowing Mineral Water

Description:
Softly luminescent seeds that have been heavily influenced by meteorites.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Glowing Seeds

Description:
Softly luminescent aqueous flora that has been heavily influenced by meteorites.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Glowing Waterweed

Description:
Malleable rock ideal for crafting barriers.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Soft Limestone

Description:
Tough vine ideal for crafting barriers.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Supple Ivy

Description:
Despite the fragile connotations of its name, this fish's strong bones are ideal for crafting barriers.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Anklefish

Description:
This piece of meteorite thrums with energies.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Jayunja Meteorite

Singular: handful of bark of living light
Plural: handfuls of bark of living light
Description:
Shorn from a tree of living light, this wood thrums with energies.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Bark of Living Light

Description:
Having lived its life in meteorite-infused waters, this fish thrums with latent energies.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Meteorfish

Description:
Using this sediment correctly in the kitchen may lead to delicious bread.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Xbr'aal Yeast

Description:
Seasonings favored by the people of Iq Br'aax.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Xbr'aal Herbs

Description:
Fish native to the waters of Xd'aa Talat Tsoly.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Xbr'aal Loach

Singular: phial of fresh Yak T'el spring water
Plural: phials of fresh Yak T'el spring water
Description:
Clear spring water from Yak T'el, high in mineral content.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Fresh Yak T'el Spring Water

Description:
A curious herb whose oils are said to be detrimental to the growth of other plants.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Growth-hindering Herbs

Description:
A strange variety of fish harboring properties that allegedly deter the growth of plants when ground into paste.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Freakish Fish

Description:
A moss-covered rock bearing an unusual aetherial signature which may have unforeseen effects on the surrounding environment.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Moss-covered Rock

Description:
A clump of leaves bearing an unusual aetherial signature which may have unforeseen effects on the surrounding environment.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Aether-infused Foliage

Description:
A clump of algae bearing an unusual aetherial signature which may have unforeseen effects on the surrounding environment.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Aether-infused Algae

Description:
Soil containing trace amounts of organic material.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Organic Soil

Description:
Tree bark saturated with water, perfect for fermentation.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Sodden Tree Bark

Description:
A fish native to the waters of Moxutural Zooj whose diminutive size makes it perfect for fishmeal.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Freshwater Mudfish

Description:
A durable stone whose abrasive surfaces are ideal for polishing and sharpening tools.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Aqueous Tsolystone

Description:
This slick, naturally occurring oil prevents rust and other long-term damage when applied to metals.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Ut'ohmu Plant Oil

Description:
A porous, pillowy wavekin that can easily scrub away stubborn patches of dirt from a tool's surface.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
Name: Tsoly Sponge

Description:
When crushed and mixed with soil, this gritty stone is known to promote crop growth.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Xobr'it Sandstone

Description:
Though slightly decomposed, this timber contains a host of beneficial nutrients for young seedlings.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Xobr'it Deadwood Log

Description:
Cousin to the cindershell, this diminutive wavekin's charcoal-rich carapace is known to improve soil health.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Iq Rrax Whelk

Description:
This aether-rich water is beloved by branchbearers.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Energy-imbued Water

Description:
These particularly soft leaves will serve to make a comfortable bed for branchbearers at the gainery.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Soft Young Leaves

Description:
This furtive fish hides itself among clumps of waterweed, and perhaps as a result, possesses an appealing flavor to branchbearers.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Waterweed Fish

Description:
Harmful insects native to the Ja Tiika Heartland despise a substance contained within this pungent powdered ore.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Odorous Powdered Ore

Description:
Harmful insects native to the Ja Tiika Heartland despise a substance contained within this pungent tree sap.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Odorous Sap

Description:
Harmful insects native to the Ja Tiika Heartland despise a substance contained within this pungent waterweed.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Odorous Waterweed

Singular: pinch of salt of living light
Plural: pinches of salt of living light
Description:
Rock salt replete with unique aether.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Salt of Living Light

Description:
A mushroom replete with unique aether.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Mushroom of Living Light

Description:
A shellfish replete with unique aether.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Shellfish of Living Light

Description:
A natural material often used in the creation of cleaning agents.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Ut'ohmu Natron

Singular: vial of concentrated Ut'ohmu plant oil
Plural: vials of concentrated Ut'ohmu plant oil
Description:
This potent plant oil contains properties which make it a vital ingredient in the making of natural cleaning agents.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Concentrated Ut'ohmu Plant Oil

Description:
This freshwater fish contains an abundant amount of oil which may be used as an ingredient for water-resistant wax.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Ut'ohmu Trout

Description:
This rock will help Anggir determine the gainery's influence on the land's flow of aether.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Rock Sample

Description:
This strip of bark will help Anggir determine the gainery's influence on the land's flow of aether.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Bark Sample

Description:
This clump of moss will help Anggir determine the gainery's influence on the land's flow of aether.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Moss Sample

Description:
This rock is the perfect material for honing and polishing Mamook's traditional bone weaponry.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Promising Whetstone

Description:
This lumber is the perfect material for refurbishing the worn wooden components of Mamook's traditional weaponry.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Promising Lumber

Description:
This shellfish is the perfect material for renewing the traditional designs embossed on Mamook weaponry.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Promising Shellfish

Description:
This metallic dust causes firesand to ignite with an explosive “pop.”

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Tungsten Powder

Description:
This herb exudes a pungent scent which repels most wild creatures.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Yak T'el Verbena

Description:
The shell of this underwater creature is a base component for the billowing cloud produced by a smoke bomb.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Smokeshell

Description:
When crushed into a paste, this moss serves as the base ingredient for an effective healing ointment.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Yak T'el Moss

Description:
The fruit of a shrub which grows only in central Ja Tiika. Unsuited for general consumption, the bitter juice of the berries is boiled and mixed into vitality tonics.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Ja Tiika Cranberries

Description:
Thought to have risen from some subterranean realm, these fish─or more accurately, their eyes─are prized for imparting health and vigor to the consumer.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Cexudross Fish

Description:
A naturally occurring salt infused with pleasant-smelling vegetable oils.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Aromatic Salt

Description:
The Xbr'aal are inordinately fond of the scent of these little white flowers.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Sweet-scented Flowers

Description:
The scales of this freshwater sweetfish exude a delightfully refreshing fragrance.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Tsoly Sweetfish

Description:
This powdery substance is rich in vital minerals.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Mineral Dust

Description:
An unusually thick nectar bursting with essential nutrients.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Viscous Nectar

Description:
Rich minerals infuse the entire length of this fish's dense skeleton.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Thick-boned Fish

Description:
Even without further processing, this porous sedimentary rock draws moisture from the air with impressive efficiency.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Desiccant Diatomite

Description:
Even without further processing, this unusually dry wood draws moisture from the air with impressive efficiency.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Desiccant Lumber

Description:
Once it is reduced to charcoal, this mollusk draws moisture from the air with impressive efficiency.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Desiccant Mollusk

Description:
This pure crystal should serve as a suitable catalyst for Gok Golma's arcane illuminations.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Pristine Ice Crystal

Description:
This pure crystal should serve as a suitable catalyst for Gok Golma's arcane illuminations.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Pristine Water Crystal

Description:
This crystalline fish should serve as a suitable catalyst for Gok Golma's arcane illuminations.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Crystalfish

Description:
The smooth bite of this rock salt is said to be pleasing to the Mamool Ja palate.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Smooth Rock Salt

Description:
The zesty kick of this white pepper is said to bring out the flavor of vegetable ingredients.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Spicy White Pepper

Description:
Once dried and ground into a powder, this algae is said to make a delicious seasoning for soup and the like.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Freshwater Algae

Singular: bottle of Yak Awak spring water
Plural: bottles of Yak Awak spring water
Description:
Rich in mineral nutrients, this spring water is nevertheless known for its smooth and clear taste.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Yak Awak Spring Water

Description:
Requiring a special brewing process, these leaves produce a deeply flavorful tea.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Leopardfang Tea Leaves

Description:
Once dried and roasted, this tsoly grass produces a rich and full-bodied tea, bursting with the blessings of the cenote.

※Only for use in Mamool Ja society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
Name: Tsoly Tea Grass

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for an allied agriculturist.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Top Border, Bottom Border, Accent
Name: Mamool Ja Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for a delver of esoteric mysteries.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame
Name: Occult Crescent Framer's Kit

Description:
There are bunnies in your future...

※Only available for use on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Fortune Carrot

Description: A replica of a sizable stone engraved with esoteric carvings found on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Occult Epitaph

Description:
A Turali sandwich of lightly roasted meat and vegetables topped with savory olives.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Direct Hit Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +4% (Max 10)
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>VIT Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +5% (Max 12)
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Gear Durability Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3%
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
  (Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Tiika Selvaas

Description:
A mysterious orb showing visions of the cosmos.

※Up to twenty may be placed in a single estate.
Name: Celestial Sphere

Description: Though it may be difficult to explain how this elegantly sculpted trophy proves that you have visited Shades' Triangle and lived to tell of it, it will come in useful should any naysayers doubt the veracity of your claims to know the names of basic shapes.
Name: Crescent Trophy

Description: This table is well suited to spreading one's copious notes.
Name: Occult Table

Description: A plush seat undoubtedly filled with secrets. And dust.
Name: Occult Chair

Description: The inscriptions upon these stone tablets defy any attempt to decipher them, but perhaps taking them home without regard for historical preservation protocols will help.
Name: Occult Tablets

Description: An inert reproduction of the crystals found across the Occult Crescent.
Name: Knowledge Crystal Replica

Description: This map is believed to have been inked by a navigator whose vessel made landfall on the isle in years past.
Name: Occult Crescent Map

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Rectangular Glasses</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Rectangular Glasses</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on stylish oblong frames in varying colors. Use to unlock the rectangular glasses facewear.
Name: The Faces We Wear - Rectangular Glasses

Description: This peculiar contraption creates illusions by weaving together myriad shades of light. Casts a shower of floating ribbons into the air.
Name: Magicked Prism (Ribbons)

Description: Because there is no such thing as “too many frills” on a fashion accessory─or so the enigmatic crafter of this parasol believed when they lovingly stitched it together. Use to acquire a white embroidered parasol.
Name: White Embroidered Parasol

Description: Crafted with the finest lace gil can buy, this ornate parasol was designed for those fashionable frill-seekers who wish to accessorize in more subdued shades. Use to acquire a black embroidered parasol.
Name: Black Embroidered Parasol

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Home at Heart</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Home at Heart Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Garden Relics</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Garden Relics Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Garden Ruins</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Garden Ruins Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Town Theme (Dawntrail)</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Town Theme (Dawntrail) Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>A New World (Dawntrail)</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: A New World (Dawntrail) Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Exdeath's Castle (Dawntrail)</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Exdeath's Castle (Dawntrail) Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>FINAL FANTASY V: Battle 1 (Dawntrail)</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: FINAL FANTASY V: Battle 1 (Dawntrail) Orchestrion Roll

Description: This highly detailed map of the Occult Crescent's south horn, including everything from land elevation to the location of exposed rocks and roots, was drafted in hopes of making sense of the inherently nonsensical layout of the isle.
Name: South Horn Riding Map

Description: This coin dating back to the Fifth Astral Era appears to have been miscast, for the design stamped upon its face is far from standard. Its uncanny tendency to enrapture those who gaze upon it should make it easy enough to sell at any price.
Name: Esoteric Gold Piece

Description:
Crystallized knowledge of a phantom job. Use to unlock Chemist.

※Can only be used on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Chemist's Soul Shard

Description:
Crystallized knowledge of a phantom job. Use to unlock Thief.

※Can only be used on the Occult Crescent.
Name: Thief's Soul Shard
